zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Wentworth於大約1424年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Roger Wentworth51歲，母親Margery Despenser28歲。她於大約1442年與Sir Robert Constable VII在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1496年4月20日在英國越可爾福藍波洛享年73歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Wentworth于大约1424年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，她的父亲Roger Wentworth51岁，母亲Margery Despenser28岁。她于大约1442年与Sir Robert Constable VII在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1496年4月20日在英国越可爾福藍波洛享年73岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Wentworth was born about 1424, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Wentworth, was 51 and her mother, Margery Despenser, was 28. She married Sir Robert Constable VII about 1442, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 20 April 1496, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Wentworth est née environ 1424, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Wentworth, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Margery Despenser, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Constable VII environ 1442, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1496, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Wentworth um 1424 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Wentworth 51 und ihre Mutter Margery Despenser 28. Sie hat um 1442 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England Sir Robert Constable VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. April 1496 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wentworth è nata il circa 1424 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Wentworth, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Margery Despenser, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Constable VII circa 1442, nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1496, nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Wentworthが約1424年にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Roger Wentworthは51歳，母Margery Despenserは28歳であった。約1442年にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドでSir Robert Constable VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1496年4月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで73歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Wentworth(이)가 대략 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Wentworth(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Despenser(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1442년 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 Sir Robert Constable VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 4월 20일 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wentworth nasceu aproximadamente 1424, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Wentworth, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Margery Despenser, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Constable VII aproximadamente 1442, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1496, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Wentworth родилась около 1424 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Wentworth было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Despenser, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Constable VII около 1442 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 20 апреля 1496 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Wentworth nació aproximadamente 1424, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Wentworth, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Margery Despenser, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Constable VII aproximadamente 1442, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1496, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
